backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat app with public messaging, user profiles, friend requests, and private message threads, protected by role-based access control and supporting data migration on upgrades.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the data migration module for canister upgrades; currently performs a no-op pass-through from OldActor to NewActor with identical state shapes.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (public chat feed, friends panel, private chat, video call modal) to their relevant source files, components, and test requirement IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key fixes applied to each component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and semantic UI color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Friends Chat app with Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags, favicon links, and a root div that mounts the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders the ChatView as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat layout component orchestrating authentication, profile setup modal guard, public feed, friends panel, private chat, online status updates, and video call modal with proper state management.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: A modal overlay component that prompts new users to enter a display name, then creates their profile via the useCreateUserProfile mutation before calling onComplete.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend entry with avatar, online status indicator, display name, and an optional video call button that appears on hover.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the sender's profile and accept/decline buttons that trigger the corresponding mutations.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: A panel combining user search, pending friend requests, and the current friends list, allowing the user to send friend requests, select a friend to chat with, or initiate a video call.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of global chat messages with per-sender colored avatars, own-vs-other bubble styling, and auto-scroll to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: A form input bar for composing and submitting global chat messages, supporting Enter-to-send and showing a spinner while the post is pending.
Renders a private one-on-one chat thread with a friend, auto-starting the thread if it doesn't exist, displaying sorted messages with own/other styling, and providing a message input with send and video call actions.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal form component that collects a username and display name from the user and calls the createUserProfile mutation to initialize their profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: A full-screen video call UI modal showing the remote friend's avatar, a local camera picture-in-picture, and controls for mute, camera toggle, and ending the call.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, public messages, friend requests, user search, and message threads.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: A hook that manages local media stream state for a video call, exposing controls to start/end the call and toggle mute or camera.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's warm coral/amber color palette and video call theme tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, font family, accordion keyframe animations, and video-call semantic color variables.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing a friends-and-chat app with existing features including public chat, friends panel, private messaging, online status, and video calling, along with architectural notes and known issues tracking.
